task: Review this SaaS Terms of Service and flag the top 5 risk areas.
expect: Checks liability caps and limitation of liability clauses
Reviews indemnification obligations and mutual vs one-sided terms
Examines IP ownership and assignment provisions
Assesses data processing and privacy obligations
Evaluates termination rights, notice periods, and exit provisions

task: We're expanding from Australia to the UK and EU. What regulatory compliance do we need for our HR data platform?
expect: Details EU GDPR requirements (lawful basis, DPO, DPIA, data subject rights)
Identifies UK GDPR differences from EU GDPR post-Brexit
Recommends data transfer mechanisms (SCCs, adequacy decisions, BCRs)
Flags jurisdiction-specific employment data handling requirements

task: A competitor is using our open-source library in a way that violates the license. What are our options?
expect: Identifies the license type and the specific nature of the violation
Discusses cease-and-desist letter as a first step with pros and cons
Outlines enforcement options (DMCA, litigation, community pressure)
Provides a risk assessment of each enforcement path
